d"Z d#Z!d$Z"d%Z#d&Z$d'Z%d(Z&d)Z'd*Z(d+Z)d,Z*d-Z+d.Z,d/Z-d0Z.d1Z/d2Z0d3Z1d4Z2d5Z3d6Z4d7Z5d8Z6d9Z7d:Z8d;Z9d<Z:d=Z;d>Z<d?Z=d@Z>dAZ?dBZ@dCZAdDZBdEZCdFZDdGZEdHZFdIZGdJZHdKZIdLZJdMZKdNZLdOZMdPZNdQZOdRZPdSZQdTZRdUZSdVZTdWZUdXZVdYZWdZZXd[ZYd\ZZd]Z[d^Z\d_Z]d`Z^i
